companyOverview.title: About Shanghai Jinling Rubber Products Co., Ltd.
companyOverview.desc1: Shanghai Jinling Rubber Products Co., Ltd. was awarded the title of Shanghai "Five-Star Integrity Enterprise" in February 2015. From the establishment of Shanghai Jinling Rainwear and Clothing Factory in 1990 to the founding of Shanghai Jinling Rubber Products Co., Ltd. in 1997, we have been specializing in the R&D and production of "Jinling" brand rubber waterproof, acid-alkali resistant, oil-proof, chemical-proof, and various protective clothing for decades.
companyOverview.desc2: Our products include rubber waterproof suits, rainwear made of nylon, oxford, spring yarn, PU, PVC coated fabrics, and special coated materials. In July 2001, "Jinling" brand protective clothing was certified as a National Quality Trusted Brand. In April 2002, China General Chamber of Commerce awarded the "Quality Excellence Certificate" for our rubber-bonded rainwear.
companyOverview.missionText: Practical Innovation, Customer First, Dedicated to Providing Quality Service

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A leading manufacturer of protective suits and rubber products, dedicated to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction since 2003.
about.whoWeAreDesc: Shanghai Jinling Rubber Products Co., Ltd. is a professional manufacturer and exporter specializing in protective suits, rainwear, and workwear. Located in Shanghai, China's economic hub, we have been serving global customers with quality products and reliable services for over two decades.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about our products and services

moq.q: What is the minimum order quantity?
moq.a: MOQ varies by product. For standard products, we can accommodate small trial orders. Contact our sales team for specific requirements.

samples.a: Yes, we provide samples for quality evaluation. Sample costs and shipping fees may apply.

payment.a: We accept T/T, L/C, and PayPal. Standard terms are 30% deposit, 70% before shipment.

custom.a: Yes! We offer OEM/ODM services for custom products. Our engineering team can assist with design and development.

cert.a: We are ISO 9001:2015 certified. Products carry relevant certifications including CE, RoHS compliance.

lead.q: What is the lead time for orders?
lead.a: Standard products: 7-15 days. Custom products: 15-30 days depending on complexity.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subtitle: Whether you need standard products or custom solutions, our team is ready to help.

faqs.materialQuestion: What material is this product made of?
faqs.materialAnswer: This product is made of premium material, offering excellent durability and protection. Please check the specifications for detailed material parameters.
faqs.customAnswer: Yes, we offer customization services including size, color, and logo printing. Customized products generally require a minimum order of 50 pieces. Please contact us for details.
faqs.moqQuestion: What is the minimum order quantity?
faqs.moqAnswer: Standard products have a minimum order of 10 pieces, and customized products require 50 pieces. We support small trial orders and welcome new customers.
faqs.leadTimeAnswer: Stock products ship within 3-5 working days after payment. Standard production takes 7-20 days, and customized products take 20-30 days. Please confirm with our sales team.
